# Imagine Peak Studios

> A consulting practice directing and building AI-native products for founders and teams — from concept to live system. Product strategy, sonic direction, and AI engineering under one roof. Founded by Matthew Hartley.

## Background

Imagine Peak Studios (IPS) operates at the intersection of software, storytelling, and production. The studio's current work includes:

- **Harmonic Wave** — a media platform that exposes content catalogs as AI-native structured experiences. Open beta, v1.0 launching May 2026, patent pending.
- **Matthew Hartley Music** — the first artist-owned MCP server (live April 2026). Exposes the album *The Time Is Now* as a structured, queryable catalog for any compatible AI client.
- **RoboticWorks** — compliance infrastructure for autonomous systems. In development, patent pending.

## Insights

Editorial briefs and analysis on AI-native media, infrastructure, and the systems shaping creative work.

- [Streaming is the infrastructure. The new front end is now forming.](https://imaginepeakstudios.com/insights/labels-ai-discovery.md): How AI agents are reshaping music discovery, and what catalog labels, A&R, and rights holders should pay attention to now. *(For Labels & A&R, April 2026.)*

## Press

Press releases, media coverage, and announcements from Imagine Peak Studios.

- [Press index](https://imaginepeakstudios.com/press/): Updates on Harmonic Wave platform launches, Matthew Hartley Music releases, partnerships, and coverage.

## Selected Projects

- [Harmonic Wave](https://harmonicwave.ai) — Live platform, headless media-to-agent experience infrastructure
- [Matthew Hartley Music](https://matthewhartleymusic.com) — Artist platform with the first artist-owned MCP server
- [Matthew Hartley Music MCP repo](https://github.com/imaginepeakstudios/matthewhartleymusic-mcp) — Apache 2.0, with install snippets for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and any compatible AI client
- [RoboticWorks](https://roboticworks.ai) — In development

## Code

- [Imagine Peak Studios on GitHub](https://github.com/imaginepeakstudios) — Public repos including the Matthew Hartley Music MCP server (Apache 2.0)
